name: Fresh Lemon, Basil and Olive Oil Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients. Beat until well blended.
2. Pour the mixture over cooked and cooled couscous, pasta or vegetables. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes to marinate. Serve at room temperature or reheat. Makes 1/4 cup (enough for four 1/2 cup servings of vegetables).
